AS.help Oct 28 2014 CONTENTS: LAPACK and BLAS Libraries LAPACK and BLAS on the Instructional UNIX Systems LAPACK and BLAS Libraries ------------------------- LAPACK (http://www.netlib.org/lapack/) and BLAS (http://www.netlib.or

lib.org/lapack/) and BLAS (http://www.netlib.org/blas/ are linear algebra libraries. LAPACK and BLAS on the Instructional UNIX Systems ------------------------------------------------- These libraries are installed for CS184 on the Hive* compu
braries are installed for CS184 on the Hive* computers in 330 Soda (Oct 2014). EECS Instructional Support 378/384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
